sources.title: Universal Base Characters
sources.creator: Quaternius
sources.notes: The official page identifies six base bodies plus twenty hairstyles and compatibility with the Universal Animation Library.

sources.title: Modular Character Outfits - Fantasy
sources.creator: Quaternius
sources.notes: The official itch page reports Standard version 2.1 as of 2026-07-05. Record the version actually acquired.

sources.title: Universal Animation Library
sources.creator: Quaternius
sources.notes: The official itch page reports version 3.0 with root-motion and in-place exports as of 2026-06-16 and credits Gonzalo Furnier for animation contributions. Use only reviewed in-place clips.

sources.title: Universal Animation Library 2
sources.creator: Quaternius
sources.notes: The official itch page reports version 2.1 as of 2026-07-05 and credits Gonzalo Furnier for animation contributions. Use only reviewed in-place clips.

sources.title: Medieval Village MegaKit
sources.creator: Quaternius
sources.notes: Only assets present in the free Standard archive may be selected without a separate acquisition record.

sources.title: Fantasy Props MegaKit
sources.creator: Quaternius
sources.notes: Do not assume that Pro or Source-only collision and worn variants exist in the free Standard archive.

sources.title: Modular Dungeons Pack
sources.creator: Quaternius
sources.notes: The older official pack lists FBX, OBJ, and Blend rather than glTF; curated meshes require an explicit conversion record.

sources.title: Zombie Apocalypse Kit
sources.creator: Quaternius

provenance.checksumBasis: sorted filename, byte length, and per-file SHA-256 inventory

sources.notes: The official page exposes a free download but does not publish a stable archive filename or size in page metadata. Capture both from the downloaded response before extraction.

sources.title: Ultimate Stylized Nature Pack
sources.creator: Quaternius

provenance.checksumBasis: sorted filename, byte length, and per-file SHA-256 inventory

sources.notes: Use the official Quaternius download as the provenance origin. Third-party mirrors may help inspection but must not replace the recorded original archive.

modificationsApplied: curated reviewed low-poly source geometry
created closed semantic exact, family, environment, and neutral nodes
created namespaced visible interaction and condition parts
removed external textures and applied coherent standard PBR palette materials
embedded all buffers in self-contained GLB
Meshopt 1.1.1 EXT_meshopt_compression geometry-only optimization; preserved reviewed topology, nodes, materials, textures, animations, source provenance, and licenses

modificationsApplied: recurated explicit semantic-to-source architecture mappings
preserved reviewed source UVs, vertex colors, and standard metallic-roughness PBR materials
resized embedded source textures to a maximum of 512 square
replaced whole-mesh condition proxies with source-derived component geometry
preserved every previously reviewed semantic node name
embedded all buffers and textures in a self-contained GLB
applied conservative accessor-only KHR_mesh_quantization to position, normal, color, and in-range UV attributes while preserving every approved embedded image byte-for-byte
Meshopt 1.1.1 EXT_meshopt_compression geometry-only optimization; preserved reviewed topology, nodes, materials, textures, animations, source provenance, and licenses
KTX Software 4.4.2 libKTX Web encoder: embedded KHR_texture_basisu images only; retained rejected PNG images, Meshopt geometry, topology, reviewed nodes, materials, UVs, and source provenance

policy.rejected: retain PNG if KTX2 is not smaller or UASTC lower bound is not beneficial
policy.fidelityGate: restored every normal/data/alpha-sensitive source PNG and any opaque colour texture below 40 dB decoded PSNR; retained only opaque ETC1S colour textures at or above 40 dB

modificationsApplied: recurated explicit semantic-to-source architecture mappings
preserved reviewed source UVs, vertex colors, and standard metallic-roughness PBR materials
resized embedded source textures to a maximum of 512 square
replaced whole-mesh condition proxies with source-derived component geometry
preserved every previously reviewed semantic node name
embedded all buffers and textures in a self-contained GLB
applied conservative accessor-only KHR_mesh_quantization to position, normal, color, and in-range UV attributes while preserving every approved embedded image byte-for-byte
Meshopt 1.1.1 EXT_meshopt_compression geometry-only optimization; preserved reviewed topology, nodes, materials, textures, animations, source provenance, and licenses
KTX Software 4.4.2 libKTX Web encoder: embedded KHR_texture_basisu images only; retained rejected PNG images, Meshopt geometry, topology, reviewed nodes, materials, UVs, and source provenance

plannedModifications: curate crypt masonry stairs gates and niches
modificationsApplied: recurated explicit semantic-to-source architecture mappings
preserved reviewed source UVs, vertex colors, and standard metallic-roughness PBR materials
resized embedded source textures to a maximum of 512 square
replaced whole-mesh condition proxies with source-derived component geometry
preserved every previously reviewed semantic node name
embedded all buffers and textures in a self-contained GLB
applied conservative KHR_mesh_quantization to geometry only: 14-bit positions, 10-bit normals, 8-bit vertex colors, and 12-bit UVs
added authored LOD1 roots with reduced geometry while retaining reviewed state components and embedded resources
Meshopt 1.1.1 EXT_meshopt_compression geometry-only optimization; preserved reviewed topology, nodes, materials, textures, animations, source provenance, and licenses

modificationsApplied: recurated explicit semantic-to-source furniture, container, and lighting mappings
preserved reviewed source UVs, vertex colors, material separation, and standard metallic-roughness PBR materials
retained 512-square base-color textures and reduced normal/ORM support maps to 256 square
authored component-only lids, doors, locks, contents, looted markers, damage, burn, and overgrowth geometry
preserved every previously reviewed semantic root and state-node name
added standard glTF emissive material parts to applicable lighting fixtures
embedded all buffers and textures in a self-contained GLB
applied conservative KHR_mesh_quantization to geometry only: 14-bit positions, 10-bit normals, 8-bit vertex colors, and 12-bit in-range UVs while retaining repeated source UVs as float32
Meshopt 1.1.1 EXT_meshopt_compression geometry-only optimization; preserved reviewed topology, nodes, materials, textures, animations, source provenance, and licenses
KTX Software 4.4.2 libKTX Web encoder: embedded KHR_texture_basisu images only; retained rejected PNG images, Meshopt geometry, topology, reviewed nodes, materials, UVs, and source provenance

policy.rejected: retain PNG if KTX2 is not smaller or UASTC lower bound is not beneficial
policy.fidelityGate: restored every normal/data/alpha-sensitive source PNG and any opaque colour texture below 40 dB decoded PSNR; retained only opaque ETC1S colour textures at or above 40 dB

plannedModifications: author closed open locked looted and damage states
modificationsApplied: recurated explicit semantic-to-source furniture, container, and lighting mappings
preserved reviewed source UVs, vertex colors, material separation, and standard metallic-roughness PBR materials
retained 512-square base-color textures and reduced normal/ORM support maps to 256 square
authored component-only lids, doors, locks, contents, looted markers, damage, burn, and overgrowth geometry
preserved every previously reviewed semantic root and state-node name
added standard glTF emissive material parts to applicable lighting fixtures
embedded all buffers and textures in a self-contained GLB
applied conservative KHR_mesh_quantization to geometry only: 14-bit positions, 10-bit normals, 8-bit vertex colors, and 12-bit in-range UVs while retaining repeated source UVs as float32
Meshopt 1.1.1 EXT_meshopt_compression geometry-only optimization; preserved reviewed topology, nodes, materials, textures, animations, source provenance, and licenses
KTX Software 4.4.2 libKTX Web encoder: embedded KHR_texture_basisu images only; retained rejected PNG images, Meshopt geometry, topology, reviewed nodes, materials, UVs, and source provenance

policy.rejected: retain PNG if KTX2 is not smaller or UASTC lower bound is not beneficial
policy.fidelityGate: restored every normal/data/alpha-sensitive source PNG and any opaque colour texture below 40 dB decoded PSNR; retained only opaque ETC1S colour textures at or above 40 dB

modificationsApplied: curated reviewed low-poly source geometry
created closed semantic exact, family, environment, and neutral nodes
created namespaced visible interaction and condition parts
removed external textures and applied coherent standard PBR palette materials
embedded all buffers in self-contained GLB
Slice 2B1: explicitly remapped narrative document, remains, statue, and artifact roots to distinct reviewed FP/ZA source meshes
Slice 2B1: preserved existing materials, UVs, vertex colors, and zero embedded images without re-encoding
Slice 2B1: remapped only component state/condition nodes and verified no component reuses its complete base mesh
Slice 2B2: explicitly remapped machines, device fallbacks, and barricades to reviewed FP/ZA source meshes; added FP Anvil and Anvil_Log geometry without external textures or resources.
Slice 2B2: preserved state/condition components as non-base source meshes to prevent full-base overlap and z-fighting.
Meshopt 1.1.1 EXT_meshopt_compression geometry-only optimization; preserved reviewed topology, nodes, materials, textures, animations, source provenance, and licenses

modificationsApplied: recurated explicit semantic-to-source furniture, container, and lighting mappings
preserved reviewed source UVs, vertex colors, material separation, and standard metallic-roughness PBR materials
retained 512-square base-color textures and reduced normal/ORM support maps to 256 square
authored component-only lids, doors, locks, contents, looted markers, damage, burn, and overgrowth geometry
preserved every previously reviewed semantic root and state-node name
added standard glTF emissive material parts to applicable lighting fixtures
embedded all buffers and textures in a self-contained GLB
applied conservative KHR_mesh_quantization to geometry only: 14-bit positions, 10-bit normals, 8-bit vertex colors, and 12-bit in-range UVs while retaining repeated source UVs as float32
Meshopt 1.1.1 EXT_meshopt_compression geometry-only optimization; preserved reviewed topology, nodes, materials, textures, animations, source provenance, and licenses
KTX Software 4.4.2 libKTX Web encoder: embedded KHR_texture_basisu images only; retained rejected PNG images, Meshopt geometry, topology, reviewed nodes, materials, UVs, and source provenance

policy.rejected: retain PNG if KTX2 is not smaller or UASTC lower bound is not beneficial
policy.fidelityGate: restored every normal/data/alpha-sensitive source PNG and any opaque colour texture below 40 dB decoded PSNR; retained only opaque ETC1S colour textures at or above 40 dB

modificationsApplied: curated reviewed low-poly source geometry
created closed semantic exact, family, environment, and neutral nodes
created namespaced visible interaction and condition parts
removed external textures and applied coherent standard PBR palette materials
embedded all buffers in self-contained GLB
Slice 2B2: explicitly remapped vegetation roots to reviewed USN growth meshes and added MV Prop_Vine1 geometry for vine/overgrowth without external textures or resources.
Slice 2B2: remapped weathered, damaged, burned, and overgrown components to non-base meshes for visible condition distinction without full-base overlap.
added authored LOD1 roots with reduced geometry while retaining reviewed state components and embedded resources
Meshopt 1.1.1 EXT_meshopt_compression geometry-only optimization; preserved reviewed topology, nodes, materials, textures, animations, source provenance, and licenses
